# Load necessary libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

# Load the data

## Inference Metrics
```{r}
# Take the old data (trained using 5 new augmented images)
df <- read.csv("./results/model_evaluation_results_allData.csv")
df$reduction <- "5"
df_all <- df %>%
    filter((modelname == "U-NET" & crop == "wheat") |
                 (modelname == "SegFormer" & crop == "sorghum")) %>%
    select(c(crop,collectiondate,genotype,modelname,reduction,IoU,Precision,Recall,F1))

head(df_all)    

# Take new data
df <- read.csv("./results/model_evaluation_results_dataRemoval_new.csv")

df_new <- df %>%
    select(c(crop,collectiondate,genotype,modelname,reduction,IoU,Precision,Recall,F1))

df_combined <- bind_rows(df_all, df_new)
head(df_combined)

df_combined$reduction <- case_when(
    df_combined$reduction == "5" ~ "+5 Augmentations",
    df_combined$reduction == "4" ~ "+4 Augmentations",
    df_combined$reduction == "3" ~ "+3 Augmentations",
    df_combined$reduction == "2" ~ "+2 Augmentations",
    df_combined$reduction == "1" ~ "Original Data",
    df_combined$reduction == "10less" ~ "-10% Data",
    df_combined$reduction == "20less" ~ "-20% Data",
    df_combined$reduction == "30less" ~ "-30% Data",
    df_combined$reduction == "40less" ~ "-40% Data",
    df_combined$reduction == "50less" ~ "-50% Data",
)
head(df_combined)
```

## Training Metrics
```{r}
df_metrics <- read.csv("./results/training_metrics_reducing.csv")
head(df_metrics)

df_metrics_renamed <- df_metrics %>%
    mutate(Number.of.Augmentations.Used = case_when(
        Number.of.Augmentations.Used == "5" ~ "+5 Augmentations",
        Number.of.Augmentations.Used == "4" ~ "+4 Augmentations",
        Number.of.Augmentations.Used == "3" ~ "+3 Augmentations",
        Number.of.Augmentations.Used == "2" ~ "+2 Augmentations",
        Number.of.Augmentations.Used == "1" ~ "Original Data",
        Number.of.Augmentations.Used == "-10%" ~ "-10% Data",
        Number.of.Augmentations.Used == "-20%" ~ "-20% Data",
        Number.of.Augmentations.Used == "-30%" ~ "-30% Data",
        Number.of.Augmentations.Used == "-40%" ~ "-40% Data",
        Number.of.Augmentations.Used == "-50%" ~ "-50% Data",
    ))

head(df_metrics_renamed)

```

# Data Visualization

```{r}
purdue_colors <- c(
  "black" = "#000000",
  "gold" = "#CEB888",
  "white" = "#FFFFFF",
  "steel" = "#555960"
)
purdue_palette <- c("#CEB888", "#555960", "#B6A76A", "#7A6A53", "#F3E5AB", "#A8996E", "#6E6E6E", "#E1C16E")

```

## Training Metrics
```{r}

df_metrics_renamed$Number.of.Augmentations.Used <- factor(
  df_metrics_renamed$Number.of.Augmentations.Used,
  levels = c("+5 Augmentations", "+4 Augmentations", "+3 Augmentations", "+2 Augmentations", "Original Data",
             "-10% Data", "-20% Data", "-30% Data", "-40% Data", "-50% Data")
)

models <- unique(as.character(df_metrics_renamed$Model))
# preserve model order in the data (avoid accidental reordering)
df_metrics_renamed$Model <- factor(df_metrics_renamed$Model, levels = models)

# map colors explicitly to model names (safe ordering)
color_vals <- setNames(purdue_palette[seq_len(length(models))], models)

# labels, named to match models
label_vals <- case_when(
  models == "SegFormer" ~ "SegFormer - Sorghum",
  models == "U-Net"    ~ "U-NET - Wheat",
  TRUE                 ~ models
)
names(label_vals) <- models

p1 <- ggplot(df_metrics_renamed, aes(x = Number.of.Augmentations.Used, y = Number.of.Epochs, group = Model, color = Model)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.5, alpha = 0.85) +
  # let color be mapped by the scale so legend and lines match; keep point fill constant
  geom_point(size = 3, shape = 21, aes(color = Model), fill = purdue_colors["gold"], stroke = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vals, labels = label_vals, name = "Model / Crop") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(
      floor(min(df_metrics_renamed$Number.of.Epochs, na.rm = TRUE)),
      ceiling(max(df_metrics_renamed$Number.of.Epochs, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(title = "Epochs until Convergence for The Different Models/Crops",
       x = "Data Reduction/Augmentation",
       y = "Number of Epochs until Convergence") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = purdue_colors["white"], color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = purdue_colors["white"], color = NA),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 12),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = purdue_colors["gold"], linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p1)
ggsave("./results/epochs_convergence_dataReducing.png", plot = p1, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 700)
```

## Removing Outliers
```{r}
remove_outliers <- function(x, na.rm = TRUE, ...) {
    qnt <- quantile(x, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = na.rm, ...)
    H <- 1.5 * IQR(x, na.rm = na.rm)
    y <- x
    y[x < (qnt[1] - H)] <- NA
    y[x > (qnt[2] + H)] <- NA
    return(y)
}

summary(df_combined$IoU)

df_combined <- df_combined %>%
    mutate(across(IoU, ~remove_outliers(.x))) %>%
    drop_na()

summary(df_combined$IoU)
```

## Inference Metrics
```{r}
# Compute mean and SD for each reduction group
df_bar <- df_combined %>%
  group_by(reduction, crop) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_IoU = mean(IoU, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_IoU = sd(IoU, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    lower = pmax(0, mean_IoU - sd_IoU),
    upper = mean_IoU + sd_IoU,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(df_bar)

df_bar <- df_bar %>%
  mutate(crop = trimws(tolower(as.character(crop))))

df_bar$crop <- factor(df_bar$crop, levels = c("wheat", "sorghum"))

print(unique(df_bar$crop)); print(levels(df_bar$crop))

df_bar$reduction <- factor(
  df_bar$reduction,
  levels = c("+5 Augmentations", "+4 Augmentations", "+3 Augmentations", "+2 Augmentations", "Original Data",
             "-10% Data", "-20% Data", "-30% Data", "-40% Data", "-50% Data")
)

crops <- unique(as.character(df_bar$crop))
# preserve model order in the data (avoid accidental reordering)
df_bar$crop <- factor(df_bar$crop, levels = crops)

# map colors explicitly to model names (safe ordering)
color_vals <- setNames(purdue_palette[seq_len(length(crops))], crops)

# labels, named to match models
label_vals <- case_when(
  crops == "sorghum" ~ "SegFormer - Sorghum",
  crops == "wheat" ~ "U-NET - Wheat",
  TRUE                 ~ crops
)
names(label_vals) <- crops

# Bar plot with error bars
p_bar <- ggplot(df_bar, aes(x = reduction, y = mean_IoU, fill = crop)) +
  geom_bar(stat='identity', position='dodge') +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
                width = 0.2, color = purdue_colors["black"], linewidth = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_vals, labels = label_vals, name = "Crop / Model") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 20), limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0.01)) +
  labs(title = "Mean IoU by Data Reduction/Augmentation and Crop - Model",
       x = "Data Reduction / Augmentation",
       y = "Mean IoU ± SD") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = purdue_colors["white"], color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = purdue_colors["white"], color = NA),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 11),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 13, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 11),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = purdue_colors["gold"], linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p_bar)

ggsave("./results/IoU_bar_by_data_reduction.png", plot = p_bar, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 600)

```
